items.title: American Express to build 55-floor tower at World Trade Center site
items.description: Financial giant American Express has announced plans for the construction of a 55-floor building at 2 World Trade Center in Lower Manhattan.

items.title: Aston Martin to cut up to 20% of its workforce
items.description: Aston Martin announced a plan to cut up to 20% of its workforce as ongoing financial struggles and challenging market conditions affecting the luxury ...

items.title: Jamie Dimon warns of pre-financial crisis parallels, says some people doing ‘dumb things’
items.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon warned that current market conditions mirror 2008 financial crisis buildup, citing high asset prices and risky lending practi...

items.title: Dog treats recalled over fears of salmonella contamination, FDA says
items.description: The FDA announced a recall of Elite Treats Chicken Chips for Dogs due to potential salmonella contamination. No illnesses have been reported yet.

items.title: Consumer confidence rebounds in February as Americans grow less pessimistic about jobs
items.description: February consumer confidence improved but stayed below 2024 peaks as households continue weighing job market prospects against persistent cost worries...
